one_time_description: Write-down of investments recorded as an expense in the consolidated statement of operations
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in multiple government business enterprises including Wahgoshig Resources Limited Partnership (99%), Wahgoshig Energy LP (99%), Niiwin Limited Partnership (24.75%), and Kisis Aki Energy Inc. (50%). Also holds quoted mining/resource stock investments. Write-down of investments of $908,649 in 2022.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain financial statements for Kisis Aki Energy Inc. (50% owned GBE) as at March 31, 2022. Nine GBEs accounted for using modified equity method. Investments include quoted mining stocks with significant write-downs ($908,649 in 2022 vs $3,347,384 cumulative). Consolidated revenue trust funds of $410,088 held in Ottawa Trust accounts under Indian Act. Large increase in accounts receivable ($7.7M vs $2.5M prior year) and deferred revenue ($2.6M vs $1.3M). Advance to Wahgoshig Resources Limited Partnership of $144,000. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Wabun Tribal Council + Ontario First Nations LP + Nishnawbe Aski Nation + Kunuwanimano + Provincial = $16,749,917 but Wabun Tribal Council and similar may not be government; conservatively ISC + CMHC + Provincial + Kunuwanimano included.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
